mapper.insert: insert into jg_cool_item(id, name, title, price, image, pub_date) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{title}, #{price}, #{image}, #{pubDate})
mapper.update:
update jg_cool_item
name=#{name},
title=#{title},
price=#{price},
image=#{image},
pub_date=#{pubDate}
where id=#{id}
mapper.select: select jg_cool_item.*, (select count(1) from jg_cool_item_thumb where item_id = jg_cool_item.id) thumbCount, (select count(1) from jg_cool_item_comment where item_id = jg_cool_item.id) commentCount, 0 as isThumb from jg_cool_item where id = #{id}

select jg_cool_item.*,(select count(1) from jg_cool_item_thumb where item_id=jg_cool_item.id) thumbCount, (select count(1) from jg_cool_item_comment where item_id=jg_cool_item.id) commentCount, 0 as isThumb from jg_cool_item
order by thumbCount desc
order by jg_cool_item.id desc

select id, name, title, price, image, pub_date as pubDate from jg_cool_item
name like concat('%',#{key},'%')
title like concat('%',#{key},'%')
